source.sqlReaderQuery: select max(DeliveryDate) as NewWaterMark from dbo.SalesData

sqlReaderQuery.value:
SELECT *
FROM dbo.SalesData
WHERE DeliveryDate > '@{activity('Lookup_getoldwatermark').output.firstRow.WatermarkValue}'
AND DeliveryDate <= '@{activity('Lookup_getnewwatermark').output.firstRow.NewWaterMark}'

properties.description: Get Drawin BAT files information ( 12 Files )
To pick changes or get watermark we uses source database table
